title: Solar Lights Outdoor Garden, 2 Pack Hanging Solar Lanterns with 3D Flickering LED, USB C Rechargeable, Waterproof Garden Ornaments for Pathway Patio Halloween Christmas Decor
features: 【Upgraded Stereoscopic 3D Lighting Effect】Innovative using of light refraction technology to achieve 3D fairy lighting effects, which brings unique visual enjoyment and pleased atmosphere at night.Unique birthday gifts for mum women, Mother's Day.

【Solar Powered & USB C Charging】Featured two charging ways: solar powered and type C charging. Built-in 800mAh rechargeable battery, can store more power and greatly extend the lighting time. When the sunlight is insufficient,you can also get a fully charged within 3~4 hours through USB C port, which enhances the flexibility and convenience of product use.

【Auto ON Dusk-to-Dawn & High-Efficient Solar Panel】Please ensure that the power switch is in the "ON" position when using.Featured light sensor, the solar light turns on automatically at night or in dark area (less than 50 LUX). Equipped with high-efficiency solar panel with a charging conversion rate of 20%, our solar lamp outdoor can work 6~12 hours, vary depends on the weather, which achieves the perfect combination of energy saving, environmental protection and lasting lighting.

【2 Lighting Modes, Meet Various Needs】Our solar lantern provides two lighting options: constant light mode ( in ON2) and flickering mode (in ON1 position).The constant-on mode is suitable as a stable lighting source, such as illuminating outdoor pathway, courtyard; the flashing mode can create a lively and cheerful atmosphere for special occasions such as festivals and birthday parties, adding interest and decoration to the environment, satisfying users diverse usage scenario requirements.

【Charging Indicator & Low Battery Warning】The indicator will flash red to indicate low battery during your use. This function facilitates users to plan charging arrangements in advance, avoid inconvenience caused by power issues. Besides, the indicator shows static red color and turns green after a fully charged through USB C, which lets the user know the charging situation of the device clearly at any time.

【Durable & Waterproof】The outdoor hanging lantern is made of metal which is sturdy and durable. IP65 waterproof rating withstand rain, snow, and harsh weather conditions. Retro bronze-colored design solar lights are decorative, making them a great gift choice for gardening decorating porch, patio, pathways, and backyard.

【Widely Used Garden Ornaments】The solar lights can worked us hanging wall sconce with the included hook or be inserted into the ground as a pathway light. Safety and security lighting for your yard, garden, fence, stairs, pathway, porch, patio, driveway, lawn, walkway, camping and Decor.

When the sunlight is insufficient, you can also get a fully charged within 3~4 hours through USB C port, which enhances the flexibility and convenience of product use. The outdoor hanging lantern is made of metal which is sturdy and durable. IP65 waterproof rating withstand rain, snow, and harsh weather conditions. Retro bronze-colored design solar lights are decorative, making them a great gift choice for decorating porch, patio, pathways, and backyard.
